rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL et al VS. HAYLEE YEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Hearing On Mtn For Approval Of Sale Of Real Property Located At 763-767 And 769-771 Tehama Street, San Francisco
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 6, 2014, line 1. OTHER E. LYNN SCHOENMANN's Motion For Approval Of Sale Of Real Property Located At 763-767 And 769-771 Tehama Street, San Francisco Continued to September 5, 2014 pending the resolution of appeal regarding appealability of this Court's Order regarding sale. If appeal is resolved earlier moving party may appear ex-parte to advance the hearing date. If appeal is not resolved by September 5, 2014 moving party shall advise the Court. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARTIN ENG VS. STEVE M. JEONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Require Vexatious Litigant Martin Eng To Provide Security Pursuant To Ccp 391.1,Et.Seq.
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 6, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANTs SHERMAN YOUNG, SHERWOOD YOUNG and LAM, LOUISE S.K.'s Motion To Require Vexatious Litigant Martin Eng To Provide Security Pursuant To Ccp 391.1 GRANTED. Moving defendants have shown that Plaintiff has no reasonable probability of prevailing on the merits against the moving defendants. Plaintiff shall post a bond in the amount of $20,000 no later than August 22, 2014. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN A BANNER et al VS. SARA SHEPHERD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re-Noticed Joint Notice Of Motion, And Motion To Confirm Final Arbitration Award And To Dismiss Petitioners Petition To Confirm Partial Final Award
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 6, 2014, line 3. RESPONDENTs SARA SHEPHERD and STEVEN DODARO's Motion To Confirm Final Arbitration Award And To Dismiss Petition To Confirm Partial Final Award DENIED. Arbitrator exceed jurisdiction (CCP 1284,1286.6 and JAMES Rules 24(j)) by changing the ownership interest of parking space C from "exclusive use common area," subject to right to use until sale (Final Award) to "common area" with each owner having an undivided interest in parking space C (Corrected Final Award). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANTHONY VERMILLION VS. MARGARITA MORENO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Determining Good Faith Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 6, 2014, line 4. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK's Motion Determining Good Faith Settlement GRANTED. Moving party sustained its burden under Tech-Built, Inc v. Woodward-Clyde & Associates (1985) 38 Cal.3d 488. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SATISH GUPTA VS. DANIEL LIPSITT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 6, 2014, line 5. PLAINTIFF SATISH GUPTA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA VS. GUEORGUI ANDREEV et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Deft To Provide Further Responses To Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer-Set One, Form Interrogatories, General-Set One, And Inspection Demand-Set One; And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions Against Deft
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 6, 2014, line 7. PLAINTIFF ESSEX MANAGEMENT CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Defendant To Provide Further Responses To Form Interrogatories-Unlawful Detainer-Set One, Form Interrogatories, General-Set One, And Inspection Demand-Set One; And For An Award Of Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Hearing Required. Parties are ordered to appear at 9:00 a.m. and engage in meet and confer efforts regarding new responses. Parties shall report to the Court with a list of responses, if any, still in dispute. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LUC P. DESCHAUMES et al VS. RODOLFO G. BEBING et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 6, 2014, line 8. DEFENDANTs NEDDY BACHO, CARMELITA ROTH and ALFONSO ROMANO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Demurrer is not a motion to challenge the veracity of Plaintiff's allegations. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SUSAN POWELL VS. PHIL HANLEY et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, August 6, 2014, line 9. DEFENDANT PHILIP HANLEY's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend to reconcile allegations in paragraph 6 of complaint and the lease; and to allege whether Plaintiff resides in the unit at issue. = (501/REQ)
